questions.question: What soap opera became the longest-running radio and TV show, following the Bauer family and their descendants in the midwestern town of Springfield?
Name the famous square-jawed comic strip detective and beau to Tess Trueheart.
To what city was Johnny Cash going after he and June "got married in a fever" and after "the fire went out"?
The 1960 election made history with the first televised Presidential debate. Who were the two candidates?
questions.answer: John F. Kennedy and Richard Nixon

questions.question: What TV show included the following line in every episode? "This tape will self-destruct in five seconds."
